SQLScript:
SELECT 
   RecordType
  ,MCOContractNumber
  ,PBPNumber
  ,BeneficiaryID
  ,Surname
  ,FirstName
  ,MiddleInitial
  ,Sex
  ,DateOfBirth
  ,LowIncomePeriodStartDate
  ,LowIncomePeriodEndDate
  ,LIPSpercentage
  ,PremiumLISAmount
  ,LowIncomeCoPayLevelID
  ,BeneficiarySourceofSubsidyCode
  ,LISActivityFlag
  ,PBPStartDate
  ,NetPartDPremiumAmount
  ,ContractYear
  ,InstitutionalStatusIndicator
  ,PBPEnrollmentTerminationDate
  ,'' AS Filler
  ,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
FROM LISHIST
WHERE
FileId = (SELECT MAX(FileId) FROM LISHIST)
